name: IG-GAN: A Generative Adversarial Network for Aerodynamic Data Generation Based on Intrinsic Geometry

description: arXiv:2607.11497v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing generative models learn data distributions in flat Euclidean space. However, most data in our real world are manifolds embedded in high dimensional Euclidean space. Therefore, we propose an intrinsic-geometry-based generative adversarial network (IG-GAN) for data generation in the field of aerodynamics. The generator of the IG-GAN repre...
author: Ying Yan, Liwei Hu, Xiaoming Zhang
